summary: The footage captures a dashcam recording from a vehicle traveling along a narrow road surrounded by dense trees. The timestamp indicates July 10, 2015, at approximately 10:56 AM. Initially, the road appears clear with minimal traffic. As the vehicle advances, it encounters a white van traveling in the opposite direction. Shortly after, the vehicle experiences a sudden blackout, plunging the footage into darkness.

events_timeline.event: A white van travels in the opposite direction alongside the ego-vehicle.

uncertainties: The blackout duration is unclear, making it difficult to assess the full extent of the incident.

risk_assessment.why: Due to the abrupt blackout, it is impossible to evaluate the severity of the incident comprehensively.
